title: compiled agent brainpack format
decision: Brainpacks remain RFC-only in v0: the compiled format carries exactly role, capability, and decision templates and adds no new fields.
unblock_condition: An RFC defining additional brainpack fields (e.g. memory seeds, tool grants) with schema and owner sign-off.
deferral_rollback_rule: Brainpack format reverts to role/capability/decision templates only.
